title: odontites citrinus
intro: Odontites citrinus, also known as Downy-toothed Odontites, is a flowering plant species within the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Odontites citrinus include its potential to treat various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea, and its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be cautioned and under the guidance of a medical professional.
